skill_execution.question: Who set the fastest lap in qualifying?

sql:
SELECT
    dm.full_name,
    FORMAT("%02d:%02d.%03d",
        CAST(FLOOR(t.lap_time_sec / 60) AS INT64),
        CAST(FLOOR(MOD(CAST(t.lap_time_sec AS NUMERIC), 60)) AS INT64),
        CAST(MOD(CAST(t.lap_time_sec * 1000 AS INT64), 1000) AS INT64)
    ) AS formatted_lap_time
  FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.telemetry AS t
  JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.driver_mapping_2026 AS dm
    ON TRIM(CAST(t.driver_number AS STRING)) = TRIM(CAST(dm.driver_number AS STRING))
  WHERE
    t.session_type = 'Q'
    AND t.season = 2026
    AND t.event_name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
    AND t.lap_time_sec IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY
    t.lap_time_sec ASC
  LIMIT 1
